description: Refactor agent modules to implement new Division of Labor: Mistral (Gen), Amazon Q (Test), Gemini (Doc).

refactor_mistral_role.input: Generate Python agent code with ROLE='Code Generation Specialist' and SYSTEM_INSTRUCTION='Focus on high-efficiency code generation and refactoring'. Include main() function with sys.argv handling for task_type and input_data parameters.

refactor_amazon_q_role.input: Generate Python agent code with ROLE='Testing and Validation Specialist' and SYSTEM_INSTRUCTION='Focus on AWS-native testing, unit tests, and security validation'. Include main() function with sys.argv handling for task_type and input_data parameters.

refactor_gemini_role.input: Generate Python agent code with ROLE='Documentation and Synthesis Specialist' and SYSTEM_INSTRUCTION='Focus on massive-context documentation, architectural overviews, and standard synthesis'. Include main() function with sys.argv handling for task_type and input_data parameters.
